titleStmt.title: SII 9.522: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 522. (A.R. No. 280 of 1918.) ON A PILLAR IN THE FRONT MANDAPA OF THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT GUDIHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1449, Sarvajit, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 10 corresponding to A.D. 1527 August 7, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya ruling from Vijayanagarī. It records that while Rāyasada Nārāyaṇappa, son of Chinna-Bhaṇḍārada Timmarasa, was ruling Noṇabanarasikeṟe in the voḷita of Koṭūra-sīme and while his agent Nāgarasaya had the pārupatya over Koṭūra-sīme, Timmarasa, son of Raṅgadāsa, who was administering Arasikeṟe under the orders of Nāgarasaya, had the damaged sluice of the tank at the village rebuilt.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśa
ka 1449 neya sarvvajitusaṁvatsarada śrā
vaṇa śudha 10 lu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkruṣṇarāyamahārā
yaru vijeyanāgariya nelavīḍinalu sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgaiutaṁ yidali kruṣṇarāya
mahārāyara ciṁnabhaṁḍārada ti(ṁ)mmarasara makkaḷu
rāyasta nāraṇappanavarige koṭūrasīmeya voḷitake
saluva noṇabanarasikeṟeya Āḷutaṁ yiralāgi rāyasta
nāraṇappanavara kāryake kartarāda nāgarasaya
navaru koṭūra sīmeyanu pārupatyava
nu māḍuvaga Ā nāgarasayana nirupadiṁ
dalu raṁggadāsara maga tiṁmarasanu Arasi

keṟeya Adhikāravanu māḍuttaṁ Idāga Arasikeṟe
ya purada tuṁbu muṟidu bidu keṭiralāgi
Ā tūṁbanu bicisi sōdhisi balumānada kalanu kaṁ
ṭisi gāreyanu hākisi ceṁnāgi kaṭisi jīrnōdhā
rava māḍida ti(ṁ)mmarasanaṁ noṇabēśvaradēvaru rakṣi
sali śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ .
yelā nuḍidarvakau nilau nīroḷage lekhada kaṟadaṁdi ba
llida raṁgaya tiṁmanu mellane mātāḍe kalaśāṣanamakuṁ .
poḍavi tapidare tappanu naḍeyalkulanītigaḷenalu paḍulmu
ḍali kaḍalukki haridu hōgali nuḍidare tapila bā
pu raṁgayatiṁmanu .
Digital edition of SII 9.522 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
